title: Math and Function Nodes
description: Implement 7 math and function utility nodes that operate on scalar and boolean values. These nodes are the plumbing that connects parameter sliders to geometry operations -- e.g., a slider value goes through IntegerMath to compute segment count for a cylinder. Pure data nodes with no mesh dependency. Nodes: BooleanMath (AND/OR/NOT/XOR), IntegerMath (Add/Subtract/Multiply/Divide/Modulo/Power/Min/Max), FloatToInt (Round/Floor/Ceil/Truncate), Compare (Less/Greater/Equal with epsilon), RandomValue (float/int/vector in range with seed), InputInt (constant integer), InputVector (constant Vector3f).
definition-of-done: 1. Seven node classes exist in nodes/math/. 2. Each implements MeshNode with correct port types. 3. BooleanMath supports AND/OR/NOT/XOR via a mode parameter. 4. IntegerMath supports Add/Subtract/Multiply/Divide/Modulo/Power/Min/Max. 5. Compare supports float comparison with configurable epsilon. 6. RandomValue produces deterministic output for a given seed. 7. All nodes evaluate correctly in isolation.
testing-plan: 1. Unit test each math operation mode with known inputs/outputs. 2. Test BooleanMath truth tables. 3. Test Compare with values near the epsilon boundary. 4. Test RandomValue determinism: same seed produces same output. 5. Wire IntegerMath into a MeshCylinder segments input via NodeGraph, verify the cylinder changes.
todos: DONE : Implement BooleanMathNode with mode enum
DONE : Implement IntegerMathNode with mode enum
DONE : Implement FloatToIntNode with mode enum (Round/Floor/Ceil/Truncate)
DONE : Implement CompareNode with epsilon parameter
DONE : Implement RandomValueNode with seed, min, max inputs
DONE : Implement InputIntNode (constant with exposed value)
DONE : Implement InputVectorNode (constant Vector3f with exposed x/y/z)
